caption: A group of martial artists is performing a choreographed routine in a spacious, well-lit hall with chandeliers hanging from the ceiling. The performers are dressed in traditional martial arts attire, with some wearing blue and others in white. They are moving in unison, executing precise and fluid movements that involve both hand gestures and the use of long, flexible weapons resembling whips or staffs. The audience, seated around the performance area, watches attentively as the practitioners demonstrate their skills and coordination. The atmosphere is one of focus and discipline, highlighting the artistry and technique of the martial arts being showcased.
